human_burden_proxy: count clarification and approval requests; no external participants
stop_rules: Stop before outcomes if any split, baseline, threshold, seed, or evaluator binding drifts.
Stop the affected case on malformed input, stale authoritative epoch, authority widening, unresolved collision, unknown migration, or missing effect receipt.
Stop and preserve partial artifacts if a global resource ceiling is exceeded.
non_claims: Budgets are governance constraints, not evidence that the implementation is efficient.
Synthetic burden counts are not measurements of real human workload.
Zero service spend does not establish production affordability or environmental efficiency.
